title: Voice Input
subtitle: Manage voice input, local models, and cloud transcription model selection.

enabled.label: Show voice input
enabled.description: Display the microphone action in the composer.

provider.label: Transcription location
provider.description: Use a downloaded local model, or use a cloud ASR model configured on this page.

model.label: Transcription model
model.description: Recognition model used after recording stops.
model.localDescription: Local recognition model used after recording stops.
model.cloudDescription: Cloud ASR model used after recording stops.
model.cloudActiveDescription: Cloud ASR model configured below and used after recording stops.
model.cloudPlaceholder: Save a cloud model below first

cloud.empty: Save a cloud transcription model below first.

language.label: Recognition language
language.description: Default language used for local transcription.

level.label: Microphone level
level.description: Check the selected device without running recognition.

recognition.label: Recognition test
recognition.description: Run the selected microphone through the installed local model.
recognition.modelRequired: Install the local model before running recognition.

messages.microphoneFailed: The selected microphone could not be opened.

model.deleteConfirmMessage: {{name}} will be removed from local storage.

resourceHints.sensevoice: Lightweight default model with low resource use for everyday short dictation.
resourceHints.qwen3: Higher-quality multilingual model, about 838 MiB to download and about 2.3 GiB runtime memory.
resourceHints.default: Local models use disk space and runtime memory.

cloudConfig.note: The key is saved with the cloud model; voice input only records the selected model.

preset.label: Provider
preset.description: Use the built-in Qwen ASR preset, or configure an OpenAI-compatible transcription service.

providerName.label: Config name
providerName.description: Shown in the cloud model selector on this page.

baseUrl.label: Base URL
baseUrl.description: OpenAI-compatible API root. Transcription will use /audio/transcriptions.

modelName.label: Model ID
modelName.description: Model name used by the cloud transcription API.

apiKey.label: API Key
apiKey.description: Used to call the cloud transcription service.

messages.fillRequired: Fill provider, Base URL, model ID, and API key
messages.invalidBaseUrl: Base URL must start with http:// or https://
messages.saveFailed: Failed to save cloud transcription model

messages.unsupported: Voice input is available in the BitFun desktop app.
messages.loadFailed: Failed to load voice input settings
messages.saveFailed: Failed to save voice input settings
messages.openFolderFailed: Failed to open speech model location
